completed_slice: Recovered and retained the rule that canonical baselines, additive assertions, admitted effective values, rejected assertions, and unresolved conflicts are distinct state layers and must not be blended.
observed: The canonical ACTIVE_QUEUE remains a historical baseline.
Later owner-scoped queue-update records require normalization and reduction before they can alter effective state.
Existing continuity tooling preserves rejected records, field provenance, and unresolved conflicts.
inferred: Unlabelled status synthesis can create false contradictions by mixing temporal and adjudication layers.
proposed: Add state_layer to future queue reports and materialized effective-state outputs.
remaining: Enumerate historical queue-update record shapes and classify their admissible operational fields.
Derive commit reachability from repository ancestry rather than caller input.
Batch-normalize admissible records and emit an attested materialized effective-state view.
privacy_boundary: Public repository metadata and abstract reconciliation semantics only; no private chat, health, credentials, identifying personal data, or unreviewed uploads.
